rulings.Case Title: ROBERT JAMES HANSON VS. SEQUOIA VENTURES, INC.
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, APRIL 25, 2013 IN DEPARTMENT 503 AT 9:15 A.M., LINE 1, Defendant Wismer & Becker Contracting Engineers¿ motion for summary judgment: hearing required. At the hearing the court will first determine the timeliness of plaintiff¿s C.C.P. section 170.6 peremptory challenge to Hon. Teri L. Jackson, to which an objection has been filed. If the court determines the challenge is untimely, it will then hear defendant¿s motion. If the court accepts the challenge, it will transfer the matter to the Presiding Judge, Department 206. The hearing will be at 9:15am, not 9:30am. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)
